CustomField.description: Formula Text mirroring Product2.Family onto the Order line so reports group by family without an additional join. Traverses through PricebookEntry for parity with the OLI/QLI formulas (PricebookEntryId is always set on OrderItem inserts done via the Generate-Order accelerator).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-pulled from the related Product2's Family.
CustomField.label: Product Family (Rollup)
